### Service `ApiInfoService`

- Lifecycle state: -
- Replaces: -
- Source: [community/base/src/main/protobuf/com/digitalasset/canton/connection/v30/api_info.proto](https://github.com/DACH-NY/canton/blob/v3.4.11/community/base/src/main/protobuf/com/digitalasset/canton/connection/v30/api_info.proto#L10)
- Endpoints tracked: `1`

Provides basic information about the API, like if it is an admin api or public sequencer api.
 This is useful to detect port misconfigurations and provide a user-friendly error message.
